channel.title: Finance on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Finance on MinWeb

item.title: John Ternus Named Apple CEO as Tim Cook Becomes Chairman
item.description: Apple veteran John Ternus takes the helm as CEO while Tim Cook transitions to Executive Chairman, marking a strategic new chapter for the tech giant.

item.title: Why You Feel Behind Financially (And Why You’re Not)
item.description: Stop feeling like you are failing financially by understanding money dysmorphia, the trap of social media comparisons, and the true reality of median wealth.

item.title: Yo-Yo Financing: What to Do If Your Car Loan Is Rejected
item.description: Don't fall for the yo-yo financing trap. Learn how to protect your rights, recognize this predatory dealer scam, and take action if your car loan is rejected.

item.title: Buying Your Elderly Neighbor’s Home: Risks and Realities
item.description: Thinking of buying your elderly neighbor's home? Learn the complex legal, financial, and emotional risks involved before you commit to this unique investment.

item.title: Why Is the Market Ripping? The $60 Billion Truth
item.description: Discover why global markets are surging to record highs despite economic headwinds by exploring the massive $60 billion stimulus theory driving the rally.

item.title: How the Trump Family’s $150M Dolomite Loan Trapped Users
item.description: Discover how the Trump family’s World Liberty Financial used a massive $150 million loan to trigger a liquidity crisis that trapped users on the Dolomite...

item.title: Inherited Money and CCRCs: How to Protect Your MIL’s Future
item.description: Protect your mother-in-law’s CCRC residency and Medicaid eligibility by learning how to properly manage an inheritance without triggering contract penalties.

item.title: Should You Pay for That Expensive College? A ROI Guide
item.description: Stop guessing if an expensive college degree is worth the cost by learning how to calculate your child's education ROI through debt and salary projections.

item.title: Married Filing Separately: When Is It Better Than Joint?
item.description: Discover when filing separately as a married couple can actually save you money by navigating the specific financial scenarios where joint filing isn't ideal.

item.title: Why Is the U.S. Dollar Still So Strong? The Real Reasons
item.description: Despite record debt and shifting geopolitics, discover the structural pillars like energy independence that keep the U.S. dollar dominant in global markets.

item.title: Inherited a House You Can't Afford? How to Manage the Costs
item.description: Inheriting a home can be a financial burden rather than a gift; learn how to manage the hidden costs and navigate the complexities of owning an estate today.

item.title: Buying a House After a Layoff: Should You Wait?
item.description: Considering buying a home after a layoff? Learn how to evaluate your finances and navigate mortgage lender requirements before committing to a 30-year loan.

item.title: Why Fed Rate Cuts Are Off the Table for 2026
item.description: Discover why the Federal Reserve has officially taken rate cuts off the table for 2026 as stubborn inflation and new economic pressures reshape the outlook.

item.title: Stuck in an 84-Month Car Loan? How to Escape the Trap
item.description: Stuck in a long-term car loan that has you underwater? Learn why 84-month financing is a financial trap and discover effective strategies to escape the debt.

item.title: Market Dip: Should You Invest or Pay Down Your Mortgage?
item.description: Deciding between investing during a market dip or paying down your mortgage? Use our data-driven guide to determine which move best secures your financial...

item.title: Got a Massive Salary Jump? How to Avoid the Lifestyle Trap
item.description: Stop lifestyle creep after a major salary jump by using the 50% rule to grow your wealth and achieve true financial freedom instead of just higher monthly...

item.title: How to Manage a Massive Salary Jump Without Losing Wealth
item.description: Stop lifestyle creep in its tracks by learning how to manage a significant salary jump effectively and build lasting wealth instead of falling into debt.

item.title: Inheriting a House With a Life Estate: What You Should Know
item.description: Inheriting a home with a life estate can be complex; learn your rights and responsibilities as a remainderman to navigate this legal arrangement confidently.

item.title: Inheriting a Life Estate House: What You Need to Know
item.description: Understand your rights and responsibilities when inheriting a property with a life estate to ensure a smooth transition of ownership and avoid legal disputes.

item.title: Why Your Conservative Retirement Fund Lost $21,000
item.description: Learn how hidden fees and bond market volatility led to a $21,000 loss in a conservative retirement fund and discover how to safeguard your financial future.

item.title: Child Spent $10k Online? Here’s How to Handle the Bill
item.description: Discover a step-by-step guide on how to dispute unauthorized charges and reclaim your money if your child has made accidental purchases on your credit card.

item.title: Why Your Landlord Should Sell to You at a Discount
item.description: Learn how to negotiate a discount on your rental property by showing your landlord how they can save thousands in agent commissions and fees through a direct...

item.title: Why the Fed Won’t Cut Rates Despite Trump’s Demands
item.description: Despite political pressure for rate cuts, the Fed is holding steady because interest rates cannot solve the physical supply chain crisis and inflation.

item.title: Trump Demands Rate Cuts: Why the Fed Is Paralyzed
item.description: Discover why the Federal Reserve remains paralyzed on interest rates as they navigate the stagflation trap caused by global supply chain disruptions.

item.title: Why Trump’s Demand for Rate Cuts Won’t Fix Stagflation
item.description: Discover why slashing interest rates won't resolve today's stagflation as supply-side shocks and energy costs continue to drive inflation beyond the Fed's...

item.title: Southwest Overhauls: Success Fuels Change
item.description: Southwest Airlines is undergoing a major transformation after record-breaking financial success; learn how these shifts impact your future travel experience.

item.title: Southwest's Biggest Change in 53 Years
item.description: Southwest Airlines is undergoing its biggest transformation in 53 years; discover what these major operational shifts mean for your future travel experience.

item.title: Costco vs Walmart: Which Is Actually Cheaper?
item.description: We analyze recent pricing data to help you decide whether Costco’s bulk savings or Walmart’s everyday low prices will actually save you more money each month.
